title: Smiffys Peter Rabbit Classic Tableware Party Bags x6, 17 x 20 cm with Scalloped Top, Official License Partyware for Birthday Celebrations & Themed Events, Perfect for Party favours
features: CHARMING PETER RABBIT PARTY BAGS: Add a touch of classic elegance to your party with these Official Peter Rabbit Classic License Party Bags. Each pack contains six party bags, featuring the iconic Peter Rabbit watercolour design and a scalloped top. Perfect for birthday parties and themed events, these bags are a delightful addition to any celebration.

PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIALS: Made from durable materials, these party bags are designed to hold treats and goodies securely. The classic Peter Rabbit design and high-quality construction ensure these bags are both stylish and functional, making them a great choice for any event.

PERFECT FOR ANY OCCASION: Whether it's a birthday party, a baby shower, or a themed gathering, these Peter Rabbit party bags are versatile and charming. The timeless design captures the essence of Beatrix Potter's beloved character, making your event memorable and unique.

COMPLETE YOUR PARTY THEME: Pair these party bags with matching Peter Rabbit plates, bowls, cups, napkins, bunting, and other partyware to create a cohesive and stylish theme. The authentic design ensures a seamless look, perfect for impressing your guests and enhancing the overall party atmosphere.

OFFICIALLY LICENSED: Featuring the official Peter Rabbit Classic logo, these party bags are an officially licensed product. Embrace the charm and nostalgia of Beatrix Potter's beloved character with this high-quality partyware, perfect for fans of all ages.
